name: sjtu-html-ppt-template
description: Standalone SJTU-style HTML presentation template with direct HTML and SJTU markup workflows.

scripts.build: npm run build:example && npm run build:manual && npm run build:touying
scripts.check:js: node --check core/sjtu-ppt-core.js && node --check core/sjtu-markup.js && node --check core/build-sjtu-markup.js && node --check direct-html/basic-slides.js && node --check editor/server.js && node --check editor/editor.js
